use_cases: Visualizing positive vs negative values across time periods such as resolved vs outstanding tickets
Comparing bidirectional metrics like profit/loss or gains/losses by category
Tracking trend changes in support tickets, bug resolutions, or project milestones
Displaying comparative data with diverging segments for quarterly performance reviews
Rendering financial or operational metrics with color-coded positive/negative indicators
ai_summary: A stacked diverging bar chart component built with Reaviz that displays bidirectional data comparisons with positive and negative values extending from a center axis. Uses color-coded segments (pink/red tones) to distinguish between categories like resolved vs outstanding metrics across monthly periods. Includes Framer Motion animations for smooth entrance effects and supports metric displays with trend indicators.
